languages.text: "Вертикальная разметка местности регулярно обновляется моей продвинутой вестибулярной аугментикой, и она не фиксирует нарушений целостности неба. Настойчиво рекомендую вам провести диагностику собственных зрительных систем".

"The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."
languages.original_text: "Вертикальная разметка местности регулярно обновляется моей продвинутой вестибулярной аугментикой, и она не фиксирует нарушений целостности неба. Настойчиво рекомендую вам провести диагностику собственных зрительных систем".

traits.locale_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and it registers no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own optical systems."

"The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and it registers no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own optical systems."

"The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

"The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

languages.text: «El mapeado vertical del terreno se actualiza con regularidad gracias a mis auméticos vestibulares avanzados, que no registra violaciones de la integridad celestial. Le recomiendo un diagnóstico de sus sistemas oculares».
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

traits.locale_text: «El mapeado vertical del terreno se actualiza con regularidad gracias a mis auméticos vestibulares avanzados, que no registra violaciones de la integridad celestial. Le recomiendo un diagnóstico de sus sistemas oculares».

languages.text: “地形垂直测绘数据会由我的高级前庭植入物定期更新，目前并未发现天穹的完整性出现异常。我强烈建议你对自己的视觉系统进行诊断。”
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

traits.locale_text: “地形垂直测绘数据会由我的高级前庭植入物定期更新，目前并未发现天穹的完整性出现异常。我强烈建议你对自己的视觉系统进行诊断。”

languages.text: « La modélisation verticale du terrain est régulièrement mise à jour par mes augmétiques vestibulaires avancés, et ceux-ci ne détectent aucune violation de l'intégrité céleste. Je vous recommande vivement de procéder à un diagnostic de vos systèmes oculaires. »
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

traits.locale_text: « La modélisation verticale du terrain est régulièrement mise à jour par mes augmétiques vestibulaires avancés, et ceux-ci ne détectent aucune violation de l'intégrité céleste. Je vous recommande vivement de procéder à un diagnostic de vos systèmes oculaires. »

languages.text: "Arazinin dikey haritalaması, gelişmiş vestibüler ogmetiklerimce düzenli olarak güncellenmekte ve bunlar, göksel bütünlüğe yönelik hiçbir ihlal kaydetmemekte. Oküler sistemlerinin teşhisinin yapılmasını şiddetle tavsiye ederim."
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

traits.locale_text: "Arazinin dikey haritalaması, gelişmiş vestibüler ogmetiklerimce düzenli olarak güncellenmekte ve bunlar, göksel bütünlüğe yönelik hiçbir ihlal kaydetmemekte. Oküler sistemlerinin teşhisinin yapılmasını şiddetle tavsiye ederim."

languages.text: 「地形は私の高度な前庭オーグメティックによって定期的に垂直にマッピングされ、これらは天体の完全性の違反を検知していない。視覚システムの診断を強く勧める。」
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

traits.locale_text: 「地形は私の高度な前庭オーグメティックによって定期的に垂直にマッピングされ、これらは天体の完全性の違反を検知していない。視覚システムの診断を強く勧める。」

languages.text: "Die vertikale Struktur des Geländes wird regelmäßig mittels meiner Vestibularaugmentationen aktualisiert, die keine Verletzungen der überirdischen Integrität registrieren. Ich empfehle dringend eine Prüfung Eurer eigenen Okularsysteme."
languages.original_text: "The vertical mapping of the terrain is updated regularly by my advanced vestibular augmetics, and these register no violations of celestial integrity. I strongly recommend that you conduct a diagnostic of your own ocular systems."

traits.locale_text: "Die vertikale Struktur des Geländes wird regelmäßig mittels meiner Vestibularaugmentationen aktualisiert, die keine Verletzungen der überirdischen Integrität registrieren. Ich empfehle dringend eine Prüfung Eurer eigenen Okularsysteme."
